name: meshmind
description: One MCP server merging codebase mapping (real AST for TS/JS/Python/Go/Rust + call graph), last-30-days research across 12 keyless sources with cross-source fusion, and reversible token compression with exact BPE counts.
author: Antonio van Dijck

tools.name: scan_local_codebase
tools.description: Dependency graph of a directory: files, symbols, import edges, and call graph. Real AST parsing (TS/JS via TypeScript compiler, Python/Go/Rust via ast-grep). Includes community clustering and structural analysis (hubs, cycles, orphans).

tools.name: export_codebase_graph
tools.description: Export the dependency graph as Mermaid diagram or JSON nodes+edges (D3/Obsidian-friendly).

tools.name: research_last_30_days
tools.description: Recency research from 12 keyless sources (HN, Reddit, GitHub, Lobsters, Bluesky, Stack Overflow, Lemmy, Dev.to, Mastodon, YouTube, …) with relevance reranking, deduping, entity extraction, and cross-source fusion.

tools.name: get_optimized_context
tools.description: Reversible token compression with exact BPE counts, 7 composable algorithms (strip, whitespace, line-dedup, json-min, truncate, stopwords, summarize), and host-LLM abstractive summarization via MCP sampling.

tools.name: retrieve_context
tools.description: Recover original uncompressed text from a compression ref (reversible cache).

tools.name: context_stats
tools.description: Cumulative session savings: compress calls, original vs crushed tokens, percent saved, cached refs.
